title: Prismatic Pioneers
subtitle: Prismatic PioneersObjective of the Event: This quiz is designed to challenge your knowledge and understanding of light, its properties, and its interactions with matter.
description: Event: Prismatic PioneersObjective of the Event: This quiz is designed to challenge your knowledge and understanding of light, its properties, and its interactions with matter. Light, one of the fundamental phenomena in physics, behaves in fascinating ways that are crucial to our understanding of the universe. From the dual nature of light as both a wave and a particle to its spectrum and the phenomena it produces, this quiz will explore various aspects of optics and photonics.Benefits in terms
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
